response.justification: Experienced full-stack engineer with 14+ years across multiple languages and one high-scale environment (Sociomantic), but the resume shows no experimentation platform, feature-flagging, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or growth-systems work — the core of this IC6 role. Career trajectory reads as Senior/Staff product engineer rather than Principal with cross-org platform leadership, and there is no evidence of bias detection, rollout-risk management, or measurement systems used by multiple teams.
strengths: Polyglot background across TS/JS, C, C++, C#, Java, and DLang covering the JD's language list
Real high-scale exposure at Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP requests/sec with low-latency services
Demonstrated mentoring and knowledge sharing via workshops, dojos, and a Selenium/TDD course
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or rollout-automation experience on the resume
No telemetry/metrics infrastructure or statistical analysis work indicated
Scope and influence read as Senior/Staff IC, not Principal/IC6 architecting cross-team platforms

key_factors.factor: High-scale distributed systems experience at Sociomantic
